metadata.description: Complete toolchain for creating, diagnosing, fixing, and maintaining marketplace components

agent:ext-outline-component-agent.description: Analyze component files against request using semantic reasoning. Input: plan_id, component_type, request_text, files list. Output: TOON summary with status, counts of certain_include/certain_exclude/uncertain, assessments_logged.

agent:ext-outline-inventory-agent.description: Load marketplace inventory and perform initial scope assessment (artifact types, bundle scope). Input: plan_id, component_types, content_pattern, bundle_scope, include_tests, include_project_skills. Output: TOON summary with status, inventory_file path, scope, and counts per component type.

agent:tool-coverage-agent.description: Analyze tool declarations vs actual usage in a component file. Input: file_path, declared_tools list, component_type. Output: JSON with declared_tools, used_tools, analysis (missing/unused/false_positives), confidence.

skill:ext-outline-workflow.description: Shared workflow steps and verification knowledge for plugin development outline, loaded by phase-3-outline skill

skill:ext-triage-plugin.description: Triage extension for marketplace plugin findings during plan-finalize phase

skill:plugin-apply-lessons-learned.description: Apply accumulated lessons learned to component documentation

skill:plugin-architecture.description: Architecture principles, skill patterns, and design guidance for building goal-based marketplace components

skill:plugin-create.description: Create new marketplace components (agents, commands, skills, bundles) with proper structure and standards compliance

skill:plugin-doctor.description: Diagnose and fix quality issues in marketplace components with automated safe fixes and prompted risky fixes

skill:plugin-maintain.description: Comprehensive maintenance skill for marketplace components - update components, manage knowledge, maintain READMEs, restructure, and apply orchestration compliance

skill:plugin-plan-implement.description: Implement plugin tasks from plan with step iteration and progress tracking

skill:plugin-script-architecture.description: Script development standards covering implementation patterns, testing, and output contracts

skill:plugin-task-plan.description: Create implementation tasks from deliverables using skill delegation

skill:tools-marketplace-inventory.description: Scans and reports complete marketplace inventory (bundles, agents, commands, skills, scripts)

skill:verification-mode.description: Verification mode that stops and analyzes on failures, workarounds, or resolution issues
